response.justification: Strong generalist software engineer with 13+ years of experience, recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq, and solid TypeScript/Node.js background. However, the resume shows limited depth in production GenAI delivery — no explicit Python work, no clear evidence of RAG/vector database systems, no demonstrated multi-agent framework experience (LangGraph/CrewAI), and the AI-focused tenure is under one year. Customer-facing technical leadership for enterprise GenAI delivery is not evidenced.
strengths: 13+ years shipping production systems across web, backend, and embedded
Current role touches MCP servers and agentic workflow tooling
Strong TypeScript/Node.js background with cloud (AWS CDK) experience
concerns: No demonstrated RAG, vector database, or LLM evaluation pipeline work
Python not listed in skills; role requires Python or comparable
Limited evidence of customer-facing discovery/leadership at enterprise scale
